content.problemStatement:
Read problem statements in RussianYou are given a full binary tree of height nnn. Node 111 is the root, and for i‚â§2n‚àí1‚àí1i \leq 2^{n-1}-1i‚â§2n‚àí1‚àí1, node iii is the parent of node 2i2i2i and node 2i+12i+12i+1. For each node iii, there is a positive integer aia_iai‚Äã written on it.

A primeful cycle is a group of k>2k>2k>2 nodes x1,x2,‚Ä¶,xkx_1,x_2,\ldots,x_kx1‚Äã,x2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,xk‚Äã such that:


kkk is a prime number,
gcd(ax1,ax2a_{x_1},a_{x_2}ax1‚Äã‚Äã,ax2‚Äã‚Äã) mod k=k=k= gcd(ax2,ax3a_{x_2},a_{x_3}ax2‚Äã‚Äã,ax3‚Äã‚Äã) mod k=‚Ä¶=k= \ldots =k=‚Ä¶= gcd(axk‚àí1,axka_{x_{k-1}},a_{x_k}axk‚àí1‚Äã‚Äã,axk‚Äã‚Äã) mod k=k=k= gcd(axk,ax1a_{x_k},a_{x_1}axk‚Äã‚Äã,ax1‚Äã‚Äã) mod kkk .
Let the height of each node be 111 plus the distance from that node to node 111. Note that by this definition, the height of node 111 is 111. Let the beauty value of a primeful cycle of nodes be the sum of the height of each node.

There are qqq queries. In each query, you are given a node xxx. Considering all the nodes in the subtree of node xxx (including node xxx), find the smallest possible beauty value of a primeful cycle of nodes taken from these nodes only. If there is no such group, print ‚àí1-1‚àí1 instead.

###Input:


The first line contains two integers, nnn and qqq.
The second line contains 2n‚àí12^n-12n‚àí1 integers, a1,a2,‚Ä¶,a2n‚àí1a_1,a_2,\ldots,a_{2^n-1}a1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,a2n‚àí1‚Äã.
The third line contains qqq integers, the iii-th of which is the integer xxx for the iii-th query.
###Output:
For each test case, print a single line containing the answer to the test case. Print the answer to the test cases on separate lines.

###Constraints


1‚â§n‚â§201 \le n \le 201‚â§n‚â§20
1‚â§x‚â§2n‚àí11 \le x \le 2^n-11‚â§x‚â§2n‚àí1
1‚â§q‚â§1051 \le q \le 10^51‚â§q‚â§105
1‚â§ai‚â§1091 \le a_i \le 10^91‚â§ai‚Äã‚â§109
